reasoning: Three minimalist jewelry pieces that pair elegance with everyday wear.

items.name: Thread Necklace
items.why: Delicate 14k gold-fill thread — effortless layering for any neckline.

items.name: Bar Pendant
items.why: Clean horizontal bar in her choice of finish — a modern everyday staple.

items.name: Open Cuff
items.why: Sculptural open cuff that fits most wrists — minimal yet eye-catching.
